this past summer i had the privilege of staying down the street from the 9/11 memorial. everyday when i would see it on my way out for the day, it was a constant reminder of how much our nation came together for the good of the people. to help those whose lives have been affected, to make a better country for the future generations, and to help prevent another tragedy from happening. for those who haven't been to the memorial, it puts you in a state of awe and gives you a new perspective. within the big, bustling city, there is such silence and solemnity for those to pay respects to the thousands of inncoent people who lost their lives that day. let this day fill you with gratitude for what you have and the days you have. hug your loved ones and never forget the sorrowful day of 9/11
